pages.title: Summary
pages.text: Thermal power is a powerful way of generating electricity, building a simple thermal generator to quickly solve power shortages.

pages.title: Sterling Engine
pages.text: A device that converts heat energy into mechanical energy can be placed on top of any furnace (Furnace, Blast Furnace, Smoker, Advance Furnace, Oven), and a sponge is used on it to reduce noise.

pages.title: Faraday Generator
pages.text: A device that converts mechanical energy into electrical energy and can be used with the Stirling Engine to generate AC power.
